_说明: 宠物图鉴（单一数据源）。立绘在 src/renderer/assets/<id>/character-<表情>.png。这批是用户 AI 生成的原创宠物。desc 字段是给 tools/gen-character.js 的英文外观提示词（喂给 gpt-image-1）。

pets.name: 奶猫
pets.desc: a fluffy cream-white baby kitten with big round sparkling eyes and tiny soft pink ears

active: 代码写得真顺，我好开心
beast: 卷王铲屎官，我以你为荣～

pets.name: 麻薯
pets.desc: a soft squishy round mochi creature, glossy pastel-pink, plump and bouncy with a tiny cute face

idle: 黏在你旁边…不许赶我走 🍡

pets.name: 棉花精灵
pets.desc: a dreamy cotton-candy fluff fairy with tiny translucent wings, pastel lavender and white, floating softly

active: 灵感像星星一样落下来～

pets.name: 小舞精灵
pets.desc: a graceful little dancer sprite in a flowing pastel tutu, tiny sparkly wings, dainty pose mid-twirl

idle: 音乐一响我就停不下来～
active: 越写越带感，我转得更欢～
beast: 卷王登场，我跳支胜利之舞！✨

pets.name: 彩虹兽
pets.desc: an energetic fluffy creature with soft rainbow pastel fur and a tiny glowing horn, beaming with energy

beast: 今天闪到我自己都晕了！

pets.name: 奶狗
pets.desc: a chubby cream-and-tan baby shiba inu puppy with a fluffy curled tail, perky little ears and a happy face

active: 你太棒啦！尾巴都摇飞了！
写得好顺，奖励我摸摸头嘛～
beast: 卷王主人！汪汪汪超崇拜！🔥
今天的你，全村最靓的崽！

pets.name: 小黄鸭
pets.desc: a tiny round fluffy yellow duckling with a small orange beak and fuzzy down feathers, curious tilt of the head

warm: 对着我念一遍，思路就通～
active: 你看！讲着讲着就通了吧！
这 bug 被你拿下，漂亮！
beast: 卷王！今天的 bug 全跪了！🔥

pets.name: 囤囤鼠
pets.desc: a round fluffy golden hamster with puffy stuffed cheeks and tiny paws, sitting and nibbling

beast: 今天囤了一整个冬天的量！🌰

pets.name: 企鹅
pets.desc: a tiny fluffy baby penguin chick with soft grey-and-white down, little flippers and round feet, waddling

idle: 又开工啦…打工人互相理解 🐧
active: 这进度，老板看了都得哭
beast: 今天 KPI 被你焊死了！
